full_text:
Marquis of Hefei 合肥侯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Marquis of Hefei (合肥侯). Real name unknown, a member of the Liu clan. Marquis of Hefei was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
